hearty-egg-and-bread-bake.name: Hearty Egg And Bread Bake
instructions: Grease a 9 x 13 (3 L) baking dish.

In large non-stick skillet, cook pancetta over medium heat until browned, about 4 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain. Add onion and red pepper to the drippings in same skillet and cook for about 3 to 5 minutes or until softened. Remove from heat.
Meanwhile, in large bowl, beat eggs well with seasonings. Stir in milk.

Spread 1/2 of the bread cubes in baking dish. Layer with 1/2 each onion mixture, pancetta and shredded cheese. Top evenly with spoonfuls of ricotta cheese. Top with remaining bread cubes, onion mixture and pancetta. Pour egg mixture evenly over top; press bread cubes down lightly. Sprinkle with remaining shredded cheese.
Cover and refrigerate overnight.
When ready to serve, preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Bake uncovered in the preheated oven for 50 to 55 minutes or until center is set and top is golden brown. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting into square to serve.

herb-and-spinach-salsa-verde.name: Herb And Spinach Salsa Verde

ingredients.item: (packed) fresh cilantro leaves with tender stems
(packed) fresh parsley leaves with tender stems
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Place garlic in a small saucepan and add water to cover. Bring to a boil; drain.

Finely chop garlic in a food processor. Add cilantro, parsley, and spinach and pulse until coarsely chopped. Add oil, vinegar, and 2 Tbsp. water and process until combined but not completely smooth; season with salt and pepper.
DO AHEAD: Salsa can be made 4 hours ahead. Cover and chill.

herbed-cauliflower-rice.name: Herbed Cauliflower Rice
instructions: Fit a food processor with the coarse shredding disc; process cauliflower. You should end up with about 4 cups. Transfer cauliflower to a paper towel–lined rimmed baking sheet and press another layer of paper towel on top to blot any moisture.

Heat butter in a large skillet over medium. Once butter begins to foam (or oil is hot), add scallions and jalapeño and cook, stirring occasionally, until scallions are softened, about 5 minutes. Add cauliflower, give pan a shake to combine, and cover. Cook, shaking pan occasionally, until cauliflower is tender, 5–7 minutes. Toss in ⅓ cup chopped cilantro; season with salt and pepper.
Transfer cauliflower rice to a platter. Top with cilantro leaves and sea salt, if using.

honey-soy-salmon.name: Honey-soy Salmon
instructions: {'step': '1', 'description': 'Put soy sauce, honey, and garlic powder into a small, microwave-safe bowl. Microwave a few seconds at a time to liquefy the honey. Stir ingredients together.'}
{'step': '2', 'description': 'Place salmon in a glass or ceramic dish. Pour marinade over top, cover with plastic wrap, and marinate in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.'}
{'step': '3', 'description': 'Heat a large cast iron skillet over medium heat. Add olive oil and butter.'}

{'step': '4', 'description': 'Remove salmon from the marinade and shake off excess. Discard the remaining marinade and arrange salmon in the skillet, skin-side down. Cook until the edges turn opaque, about 8 minutes.'}
{'step': '5', 'description': 'Flip salmon and peel off the skin. Cook until fish flakes easily with a fork, about 3 more minutes.'}
{'step': '6', 'description': 'Flip salmon over to brown both sides.'}

honey-glazed-baked-salmon.name: Honey-glazed Baked Salmon
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Mix honey, green onions, soy sauce, sesame seeds, garlic, onion, ginger, and red pepper flakes in a small bowl until blended.
Place salmon in single layer in a 9x13-inch baking dish. Spoon honey mixture evenly on top of salmon; the mixture will run off, but try to coat the fish with a thin layer all over.
Roast salmon in the preheated oven, basting salmon with the sauce at least once, until fish flakes easily with a fork, about 20 minutes.

hot-chocolate-cookies.name: Hot Chocolate Cookies

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Sift 1 cup (125 g) all-purpose flour, ½ cup (43 g) Dutch-process cocoa powder, ¼ cup (32 g) cornstarch, 2 Tbsp. nonfat dry milk powder, 1 tsp. baking powder, ½ tsp. ground cinnamon, and ¼ tsp. baking soda into a medium bowl.

Using an electric mixer on medium-high speed, beat 1 cup (packed; 200 g) dark brown sugar, ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add 2 large eggs one at a time, beating after each addition until combined before adding the next; beat in 2 tsp. vanilla extract. Reduce speed to low and add half of dry ingredients; beat just until combined. Add remaining dry ingredients and beat until no streaks remain. Add 4 oz. high-quality milk chocolate (35%–45% cacao), coarsely chopped; gently fold in with a rubber spatula just until evenly distributed.

Using a #40 cookie scoop (about 2 Tbsp.), portion out 12 cookies (dough will be very sticky), dividing between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets and spacing at least 2" apart. Dollop about ½ tsp. marshmallow creme onto each cookie; smooth and swirl into and over dough as desired.

Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway
through, until spread out and slightly puffed, 10–12 minutes. Remove from oven.

For perfectly round cookies, working quickly one at a time, place an inverted glass or a round cutter with a diameter slightly larger than cookies over or around and scoot in a circular motion to smooth edges. Let cookies cool on baking sheets. Using a spatula, transfer to a wire rack. Repeat baking process with remaining dough and marshmallow creme to make about 6 more cookies.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be baked 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

hot-crab-dip-for-a-crowd.name: Hot Crab Dip For A Crowd
instructions: Preheat the oven to 325˚F (160˚C).

Melt the butter in a medium pan over medium-low heat. Add the onion, garlic, and salt. Cook for 12-15 minutes, until the onions are caramelized. Remove from heat and transfer to a small bowl to cool completely.
Using a fine-mesh strainer, drain crab meat over a bowl.

In a medium bowl, combine the cream cheese, sour cream, mayonnaise, Worcestershire, hot sauce, Old Bay, and lemon juice. Using an electric mixer, beat together until well combined. With a flexible spatula, fold in the onion mixture, ¾ cup (75 grams) cheddar cheese, and the crab meat.
Transfer the dip to a 1-quart baking dish. Top evenly with the remaining cheddar cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, until the mixture is just beginning to bubble around the edges and the cheese is melted.
Heat the broiler to low. Broil dip for 3 minutes, until the whole surface is bubbling and browned. Remove the dip from the oven. Let cool for at least 15 minutes, until set.
Garnish the dip with Old Bay and chives. Serve with carrot sticks, celery sticks, crackers, and crostini.
Enjoy!

We steam them up in a low pan with a little water and white wine and if we want a little shed of laurel.
We scold, we put out shells to some mussel, we have about 4 to adorn the casserole or each plate. We have to reserve the cooking flow.

We add minced parsley and shingle mussels, we turn around and we turn back the rice and the rest of the white wine.
We put the fire up, let the alcohol evaporate for a minute, put the fire down a little and add the broth and some of that we have reserved from our mussels.
We have been pounding and we have been cooking with medium heat for about five minutes, we have come out and put the fire down and we have been waiting another ten minutes.
About five minutes before we finish making the rice we put out the peas.
We get the rice with mussel out of the fire, we put with the mussel with shell and we cover with a clear cloth, we wait till I rest for five minutes before we get to the table. We serve at once.

how-to-make-valencian-paella-the-authent.name: How To Make Valencian Paella, The Authentic Recipe Made By A Valencian
how-to-make-valencian-paella-the-authent.original_name: Cómo hacer paella valenciana, la auténtica receta hecha por un valenciano

ingredients.item: 25 g aceite de oliva virgen extra
2 ramas de romero y otras 2 para decorar
Paella o paellera de 36 cm (nosotros utilizamos este modelo)

instructions: We put the oil into the paella, and when it's hot and we add salt at ease (we do this step so that when we add the flesh, we will not splash). We add the chicken and rabbit, we sew with a little salt. We soften the meat till it's slightly golden, and we put chicken livers into the paella (put them as far as we can into the paella so that they don't spit) and have a little salt. We're still cold till the meat's well golden.

If the tipple's dry, we have to have it all night with water to soak to get hydrated. We run the garropone, remove the tipples from the green beans and cut every Jew into three pieces (we can do with our hand). We put the vegetable in, we sewed with a little salt and scattering. We added the padded tomato and we're still cold.

On a side of the paella we toast the saffron and remove well. We put in the sweet pimenton and remove immediately so that we don't get burned. Then we added water to cover the pits bins (we have used 1 and a half liter of water in a 36 cm paellebox). When you break up and cook, we add the dyes and the rosemary (we will remove them a few seconds before adding the rice)

When the paella's broth has been cooked for 25 minutes, we remove the rosemary and we'll see that the broth will be just under the pits. We rectify salt if necessary. It's time to add the rice, and distribute well through the paella and let cook for 18 minutes, the first 5 minutes with strong fire, the remaining 13 with medium-low fire. After time we put out our fire and let them stand for 5 minutes, covered with kitchen napkins. Before serving at the table we can decorate with lemon and some branches of rosemary.

how-to-prepare-quinoa-and-vegetable-tabb.name: How To Prepare Quinoa And Vegetable Tabbouleh

instructions: Wash the quinoa very well to remove the impurities.
It cooks the quinoa into two cups of water with a pint of salt till they are spongy.
If there's still water to the quinoa, run and leave to rest.
Peel the cucumber, remove the seeds and cut into small cubes.
Remove tomato seeds and also cut into small cubes. Do with the purple ion as well.
It puts the quinoa into a large bowl and incorporates cucumbers, tomato, onion and parsley.
Fold the lemon juice and olive oil. Saxony with salt and pepper.
Mix till everything's integrated and with good taste.
He's ready to enjoy!
